mapper.update: UPDATE accessory_dept_stock SET total_stock = #{totalStock}, available_stock = #{availableStock}, locked_stock = #{lockedStock}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updater = #{updater} WHERE accessory_id = #{accessoryId} AND dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM accessory_dept_stock WHERE accessory_id = #{accessoryId} AND dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM accessory_dept_stock WHERE accessory_id = #{accessoryId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM accessory_dept_stock WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0
